docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF FELIPE PAREDES SANTOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EZEQUIEL AGUILAR, OWNER IS PRESENT. BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT ARE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER #300740, VICTOR MARTINEZ. FILING WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
